name: Commit Craft
description: Generate a commit message from staged changes, style-matched to the repo's recent commit history.
author: crunchybananas

tools.name: craft
tools.description: Draft a commit message for the currently staged changes, matching the repo's recent commit voice (length, prefixes, mood, body conventions).

repoPath.description: Absolute path to git repo. Required.

includeBody.description: If true, also draft a 2-3 sentence body explaining the why.

model.description: Override the Ollama model. Defaults to first available of qwen2.5-coder:7b, qwen2.5:7b, llama3.1:8b.
